messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Checking. Looks like Users clicking password reset links within 5 minutes receiving 'token expired'. Investigating.

messages.author: iris_nakamura
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Found the issue: Token expiry calculation used datetime.utcnow() but Redis TTL was set using loca.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
